expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The provided outputs do not contain Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts demonstrating coverage of the focus areas. result.md explicitly states: "Not demonstrated. No Phase 5b checkpoint audit/delta/draft artifacts are provided for BCIN-7289, so we cannot confirm those areas were checkpoint-audited or gated." Execution notes also list missing artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b, spawn manifest), preventing verification of explicit checkpoint coverage for prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close/save safety.
